steps.title: Identify the Contrast
steps.content: The passage describes tropical forests, then immediately describes savannas in the next sentence. The transition must signal a contrast between two different environments.

steps.title: Match to the Contrast Signal
steps.content:
”In comparison” directly signals a contrast between two things, perfect for showing how savannas differ from tropical forests.

The other three establish different relationships: “For instance” suggests an example, “Firstly” suggests enumeration, and “In conclusion” suggests closure—none fit a contrast.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
